test_framework: vitest for unit tests, playwright for e2e
verification_instructions: Run npx tsc --noEmit to confirm TypeScript compiles without errors
environment_constraints: No external network for npm install but node_modules already present. Use pre-installed tools only.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns - Tailwind CSS for styling, lucide-react for icons, Inter + JetBrains Mono fonts, violet/indigo color scheme
key_patterns: Client components use 'use client' directive. Tailwind CSS with custom CSS variables in globals.css. Dark mode via class strategy. Layout wraps with ThemeProvider. Existing animations defined in tailwind.config.ts keyframes and globals.css.
directory_structure: app/ contains all routes (Next.js App Router). components/ has shared UI. lib/ has utilities. public/ has static assets. tailwind.config.ts defines theme with custom keyframes and animations.
